PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?restaurant ?country ?city ?chef WHERE {
  ?restaurant wdt:P31 wd:Q1870891 ; p:P2864 ?stars_statement ; wdt:P17 ?country ; wdt:P131 ?city ; wdt:P3125 ?chef .
  ?stars_statement ps:P2864 3 ; pq:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(SUBSTR(STR(?date) , 1 , 4) = "2015")
  .
}
